raw_text:
Simple Deposit
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/deposits/simple
[Section: Invest Online]
You can open deposit accounts both in the branches of Inecobank and through our modern distance banking solutions, InecoOnline and InecoMobile.
[Section: Fixed-Rate Long-Term Deposits]
When choosing Inecobank as your deposit partner, you get the opportunity to invest in highly profitable and fixed-rate deposit accounts with up to 3 (three) years of maturity period.
Updated as of 04.03.2026 14:11
